steps.title: Set up remaining hours
steps.content:
Nadia needs at least $120$ total hours and already has $97$ hours. Let $x$ be the additional hours she needs:
$$
97+x\ge120
$$

steps.title: Find the minimum
steps.content: Subtract $97$ from both sides: $$ x\ge120-97 $$ $$ x\ge23 $$ The minimum additional time is $23$ hours. The answer is A.
